name: ChargePoint Holdings, Inc.
description: ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. operates one of the world's largest electric vehicle (EV) charging networks, providing a comprehensive portfolio of charging solutions for commercial, fleet, and residential customers. The company designs, develops, and markets networked EV charging system infrastructure and cloud-based services which enable consumers to locate, reserve, and pay for charging sessions. By offering an integrated platform of hardware, software, and support services, ChargePoint facilitates the transition to electric mobility for businesses and drivers across North America and Europe.
